response:
Ruffin Horne McNeill Jr. was named interim head coach after the suspension of Mike Leach, who led the Texas Tech Red Raiders to winning seasons in every year of his tenure.

**Explanation**:  
Mike Leach was the head coach of the Texas Tech Red Raiders, and during his tenure, the team won every season. After Leach was suspended, Ruffin McNeill was named interim head coach of the Red Raiders. This is explicitly stated in the context provided.
